back: Channel = sound source (instrument/sample); Mixer Track = effects + routing destination

front: How to enable sidechain compression in Fruity Limiter?
back: Right-click input level → 'Sidechain to this track from...' → pick source mixer track

Right-click any knob → Create automation clip

front: How to record MIDI from controller?
back: Enable in Options > MIDI Settings; arm record on channel; press play

front: Best practice: order of mixing operations?
back: Gain stage → EQ (cut) → Compress → EQ (boost) → Saturation → Reverb/Delay (sends) → Pan/Stereo → Master

front: What does 'freeze' a mixer track mean?
back: Render to audio + bypass plugins to save CPU

front: How to share a project with all samples?
back: File > Save As Zip Loop Package

front: Why a sound stops working after re-opening?
back: Sample referenced from a moved/deleted disk location — use Save As Zip Loop

front: Which FL editions support audio recording?
back: Producer edition and above (Fruity edition is MIDI-only)
Lifetime free updates — buy once, every future version included

front: Recommended buffer size for recording vs mixing?

back: Heavy compression on a parallel send blended under dry — sustain without crushing transients
